description: Erode rblock surface facets, removing material from surfaces based on criteria.

python_sdk_alternative.workaround: Use itasca.command('rblock erode ...') via command interface

keywords.name: minimum-distance
keywords.description: The degree of rounding is computed as the product of f and the minimum distance from a facet to the rigid block centroid. This can be more effective than using the relative option for very thin rigid blocks.

keywords.name: relative
keywords.description: The degree of rounding is computed as the product of f and the radius of a {circle in 2D; sphere in 3D} with the same size as the rigid block.

keywords.name: skip-errors
keywords.description: If the specified rounding distance is too great, erosion cannot occur as a negative volume rigid block would be created (i.e., a facet would be translated past the centroid). This keyword specifies that a warning is issued instead of an error.
